info.name: Thermo Fisher SampleManager LIMS REST API

description.content:
The Thermo Scientific SampleManager LIMS REST API enables secure connection between software applications and the SampleManager Laboratory Information Management System for simplified data exchange. Provides access to sample data, workflows, entity browsing, results, and laboratory operations. Supports token-based authentication with hardened session handling.

Contact Support:
 Name: Thermo Fisher Scientific Digital Solutions
